butyrfentanyl.dose_note: Note: The drug is reported to be potent, caution is recommended.
butyrfentanyl.name: butyrfentanyl

properties.dose: Oral Light: 400-800ug Common: 800-1500ug Strong: 1.5-3mg || Note: The drug is reported to be potent, caution is recommended.
properties.summary: Potent short-acting opioid and fentanyl analogue. Often dispensed in a nasal spray. This is an highly potent drug - exercise extreme caution. May cause respiratory depression and death in overdose.
